consistency_analysis.name: Consistent
consistency_analysis.description: Mechanically sound and consistent with established D&D 5e lore for Wall of Force. Notes on immutability (immune to damage, immune to Dispel Magic, vulnerable only to Disintegrate) are key mechanical features.
consistency_analysis.classes: Consistent (Wizard primary class, though often available to others via subclasses or other means, listing wizard is correct for core rules).

quality_analysis.completeness: High. All standard D&D 5e spell fields are present and populated.
quality_analysis.clarity: High. The description clearly outlines the geometry options (flat panels, dome/sphere) and the strict physical interaction rules (nothing passes through, ethereal plane blockage).
quality_analysis.formatting_notes: The use of inline markdown links (e.g., [invisible], [_dispel magic_]) suggests this data was extracted from a source that uses markdown for cross-referencing, which is acceptable for archival data.

core_mechanics: Immune to standard damage and Dispel Magic.
Creatures in the way upon casting are pushed.
mechanics_analysis.geometrical_flexibility: High flexibility in shape (flat planes up to 100x100 feet total area, or a 10-foot radius dome/sphere). The thickness (1/4 inch) is noted.
mechanics_analysis.concentration: Appropriate for a powerful 5th-level control spell.
